tasks.task_name: Create a Professional Associate Software Engineer Resume
tasks.task_description: How to compile a comprehensive resume for an Associate Software Engineer role, showcasing full-stack development skills and project experience?

sub_tasks.name: Gather Contact Information (Email, Mobile, LinkedIn, GitHub)
List Technical Skills (Programming Languages, Frontend, Backend, Databases, Tools & Platforms, Testing, Concepts & Practices)
Detail Work Experience (Internships and Contract Roles)
Showcase Projects (Jupiter Gem, Alankara Interior, Smart Job, Planet First, Official Portfolio, GreenGleam, Orchid Species Identifier, Restaurant Management Service)

tasks.context: The resume should highlight strong experience in full-stack development using React.js, Next.js, Angular, Node.js, and .NET. It should emphasize skills in building scalable, responsive, and high-performance web applications, clean code, system optimization, performance tuning, REST APIs, cloud deployment, testing, Agile development, and the software development lifecycle (SDLC), with strong problem-solving abilities.
